response: solution The solution identifies the error in the erroneous code which fails to handle equal adjacent elements by not using a virtual indexing strategy to separate duplicates. solution The solution corrects this by sorting the array and then placing elements at odd and even indices using a mapping function that interleaves the sorted halves. solution This solution ensures that equal values are never adjacent by placing the median and smaller elements at even positions and larger elements at odd positions. solution The solution handles negative integers correctly since the sorting and interleaving logic depends only on relative order. solution The solution achieves O(n) time complexity for the follow-up by using a quickselect algorithm to find the median instead of full sorting. solution final
